title: bidens heterodoxa
intro: Bidens heterodoxa, also known as Tickseed Coreopsis, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bidens heterodoxa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. Bidens heterodoxa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
